name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for DeKoi
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the pain point, missing workflow, or capability gap. -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What should DeKoi add or change? -->

## Expected owner or impact area

<!-- Check the areas you think are relevant. Leave uncertain items unchecked. -->

- [ ] App shell, navigation, startup, or providers
- [ ] Messenger
- [ ] Roleplay
- [ ] Catalog resources: characters, personas, lorebooks, provider connections, or ripples
- [ ] Runtime storage, generation request assembly, import/export, or remote runtime
- [ ] React-free engine behavior or contracts
- [ ] Shared API wrapper or frontend boundary
- [ ] Tauri/Rust desktop host, storage, dialogs, provider-key secrets, or runtime bridge
- [ ] Docs, clean-room boundary, contributor workflow, or templates

## Architecture considerations

<!-- Note any architecture expectations, remote-runtime needs, or risky pressure points. -->
<!-- Examples: keep engine React-free, use shared API wrappers instead of raw Tauri or raw remote fetch, preserve native DeKoi records. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any other approaches you thought about? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Optional: mockups, related issues, logs, examples, or links. -->
